_sources: https://www.thebalanceffxiv.com/ (per-job basic guides for current usage)
_notes: Each ability has 'verified': true when both recast/duration and effect are taken directly from the wiki stat block.
verified: false when the field is an approximation (e.g. shield absorbed-damage modelled as effective mit %) or when the wiki source did not provide an explicit number.

Upgrade chains (Sentinel→Guardian, Vengeance→Damnation, Third Eye→Tengentsu, Raw Intuition→Bloodwhetting, Sheltron→Holy Sheltron) keep only the highest-level form, since the planner targets level-100 raids.

icon field references a glyph name from the V0.4 mockup's SVG sprite (shield/cross/aegis/sword/star/eye/wing/diamond/triangle/note/hex/soil/heart/spark). Replace with /icons/abilities/<id>.png once a real-icon source is wired up.
mit_potency for shields/barriers is an effective-equivalent at lvl-100 raidwide damage (not the raw shield potency).

abilities.name: Arm's Length
abilities._note: Knockback/draw-in resist + 20% slow on physical strikers

abilities.name: Holy Sheltron
abilities._note: Oath gauge cost 50; grants Knight's Resolve (15% mit, 4s) + Knight's Benediction (250p regen)

abilities.name: Guardian
abilities._note: Replaces Sentinel at lvl 92. 40% mit + 1000p shield

abilities.name: Bulwark
abilities._note: 100% block rate for 10s — full mit only against physical attacks. Modelled as 100% personal for raidwide planning approximation

abilities.name: Divine Veil
abilities._note: 10% maxHP barrier + 400p heal on trigger. Modelled as 10% party mit equivalent

abilities.name: Divine Caress
abilities._note: Requires Divine Grace (post-Temperance/Holy Sheltron). 400p shield + 200p regen 15s

abilities.name: Passage of Arms
abilities._note: Channelled cone behind player. Ends on movement or action.

abilities.name: Intervention
abilities._note: Single ally. +10% if Rampart/Guardian active. Oath gauge 50

abilities.name: Cover
abilities._note: Take all damage destined for target ally within 20y

abilities.name: Hallowed Ground
abilities._note: Invulnerability

abilities.name: Thrill of Battle
abilities._note: +20% maxHP + 20% incoming heals. Modelled as 10% personal mit equivalent (HP cushion against pct-damage attacks)

abilities.name: Bloodwhetting
abilities._note: 10% mit + 400p sustain per weaponskill + 400p shield

abilities.name: Nascent Flash
abilities._note: Single ally version of Bloodwhetting

abilities.name: Shake It Off
abilities._note: 15% maxHP barrier + 300p heal. Modelled as 15% party mit equivalent

abilities.name: Equilibrium
abilities._note: 1200p instant heal + 200p regen 15s

abilities.name: Damnation
abilities._note: Replaces Vengeance at lvl 92. 40% mit + 55p counter + 300p post-regen 15s

abilities.name: Holmgang
abilities._note: Prevents HP dropping below 1 (invulnerability)

abilities.name: Divine Benison
abilities._note: 500p shield single target (2 charges). Modelled as 5% party mit equivalent

abilities.name: Aquaveil
abilities._note: Single ally

abilities.name: Plenary Indulgence
abilities._note: 10% mit + 200p bonus on AoE GCD heals

abilities.name: Asylum
abilities._note: Ground AoE: 100p/tick regen + 10% heal-up

abilities.name: Temperance
abilities._note: 10% mit + 20% heal-out. Grants Divine Grace for 30s (enables Divine Caress)

abilities.name: Liturgy of the Bell
abilities._note: 5 stacks consumed by damage, 400p party heal per trigger (max once/sec)

abilities.name: Divine Caress
abilities._note: Requires Divine Grace. 400p shield + 200p regen 15s

abilities.name: Benediction
abilities._note: Full HP restore (single target)

abilities.name: Whispering Dawn
abilities._note: Faerie HoT: 80p/tick party

abilities.name: Sacred Soil

abilities.name: Fey Illumination
abilities._note: 5% MAGIC damage reduction + 10% heal-up. Magic-only mit.

abilities.name: Deployment Tactics
abilities._note: Spreads Galvanize shield from target to nearby party

abilities.name: Excogitation
abilities._note: 800p triggered heal (target <50% HP or expiry). Aetherflow cost.

abilities.name: Indomitability
abilities._note: 400p party instant heal. Aetherflow cost.

abilities.name: Fey Blessing

abilities.name: Consolation

abilities.name: Protraction

abilities.name: Expedient

abilities.name: Seraphism

abilities.name: Oblation

abilities.name: Living Dead
abilities._note: Walking Dead state — heals back to full via attacks while active. Treated as invuln.

abilities.name: Camouflage
